prestazioni: Engine: G4FJ 1.6L Turbo GDI (Theta II) – Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with Garrett GT2867R .86 A/R turbocharger, custom 3-inch downpipe with Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converter, and HKS Super SQV4 blow-off valve for optimized spool and reduced turbo lag.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors paired with a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator and AEM 340lph in-tank fuel pump to support 350+ HP on E30 ethanol blend, with a custom ECU flash via K-Tuned K-Pro V4 standalone management for precise AFR and ignition timing.

Suspension & Handling: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8kg/mm front and 7kg/mm rear springs, custom-spec K-Mac front sway bar (24mm adjustable), and Whiteline rear subframe bushings to eliminate torque steer and improve cornering rigidity.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny Sportage GT-Line widebody kit (Pandem Design) with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders to accommodate 20x9.5 ET30 Volk Racing TE37SL wheels with 245/35R20 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires.

Exterior: Full 3M Matte Military Green wrap with custom GT-Line grille delete (replaced with a carbon fiber mesh from Seibon), and a custom LED light bar integrated into the front bumper (Oracle Lighting 60-inch curved bar with amber DRLs).

Interior: Recaro Sportster CS-II front seats with custom GT-Line red stitching, NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub, and a full carbon fiber dash overlay (Seibon) with a 12.3-inch Aim MXS Strada digital dash replacing the stock cluster.
